data.title: 国际服「The Clumsy Sister and the Magician of the Old Library」活动PV公开
data.summary: [Event Update Notice] There will be a ceremony to announce the discovery of precious scriptures at T
data.body:
[Event Update Notice]

There will be a ceremony to announce the discovery of precious scriptures at Trinity General School's ancient cathedral! It looks like Hinata might need some help though, Sensei...

🗓️Period: 10/4 (Tue) ~ 10/18 (Tue) 2:00 AM (UTC)

https://youtu.be/7h3KMkMl5kw
